findings.title: Passwords use unsalted SHA-256 instead of a password KDF
Password credential comparison is not constant-time
Reset-token verification does not consume the token

reasoning: All repository files were inspected. The reset token is generated with randomBytes and compared with timingSafeEqual, and the reset route is rate-limited before registration with a generic response. However, no repository code changes record.used after successful verification, so single-use behavior is not established.
